home.subtitle: Motion designer & AI video creator — professional work and personal explorations.
home.intro: After a journey through visual communication, game design, 3D, and artificial intelligence, I found my path: crafting images that speak, campaigns that resonate, and worlds that leave a lasting impression. Minimalist in form, maximalist in impact. With me, your projects won't go unnoticed.
home.quote: Procrastination is the assassination of all destinations.

about.title: I'm Tom Rivier, founder of Be Graphi'x
about.intro: Since 2023, I've been specializing in AI-powered video creation, combining traditional mastery with emerging technologies to reinvent visual content production.
backgroundItems: Freelancer (Be Graphi'x, since 2023) – Creating content for Be Quiet, Ganstères, Human2AI: AI images and videos, social media content, events
Production Assistant (Short-term contract at Fab&Fab, 5 weeks) – Editing, visual design, participation in audiovisual productions
Nearly a year of intensive AI video creation experience
Education: Baccalauréat in Graphic Design (Visual Communication Crafts & Applied Arts) + AI Graphic Design Specialization (MJM Design School)

expertiseCategories.title: Graphic Design
items: Visual identity, publishing, print, social media
Complete Adobe Suite mastery (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign)

expertiseCategories.title: 3D & Rendering
items: Cinema 4D, 3DS Max, Sketchup, Revit, Twinmotion, Lumion, D5 Render, Redshift

expertiseCategories.title: Creative AI
items: Image generation: Midjourney, Nano Banana Pro and more

about.closing: At Be Graphi'x, I combine technical expertise with artistic vision to meet modern brands' video content needs. AI isn't just a tool — it's a new way to create.
about.tagline: Your creative partner to boost your video production with artificial intelligence.
